zh.Blois,41018,Loir-et-Cher,Centre-Val de L: 法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean I de SULLY於大約1302年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特素利-素-洛易時，他的父親Henri IV de Sully21歲，母親Jeanne de VENDOME29歲。他於1320年7月22日與Marguerite de Bourbon在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特素利-素-洛易結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1347年8月19日在他的家鄉享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: SULLY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armelle, Christophe, Geralde, Luce, Pierre, Reynald.
English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from any of the three places called Sully in Calvados (Normandy), Aisne (Picardy), and Loiret (Centre); see 6 below.

English: of Norman origin, perhaps a habitational name from Sully (Glamorgan). However, the placename is manorial in origin, from the Norman surname in 1 above, which is recorded in Glamorgan in the 12th century.

variants.name: Soley
meanings: Catalan: variant of Solell, a topographic name from solell ‘sunny side, southern slope’, from a derivative of sol ‘sun’. Compare Sol 2.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean I de SULLY was born about 1302, in Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, his father, Henri IV de Sully, was 21 and his mother, Jeanne de VENDOME, was 29. He married Marguerite de Bourbon on 22 July 1320, in Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 19 August 1347, in his hometown, at the age of 46.

Il a épousé Marguerite de Bourbon le 22 juillet 1320, à Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 août 1347, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ko.Sully-sur-Loire,45315,Loiret,Centre-Val: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 설리-수-로이르

ko.lifeSummary: Jean I de SULLY(이)가 대략 1302년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 설리-수-로이르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri IV de Sully(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de VENDOME(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1320년 7월 22일 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 설리-수-로이르에서 Marguerite de Bourbon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1347년 8월 19일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Marguerite de Bourbon em 22 de julho de 1320, em Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean I de SULLY родился около 1302 г. в местности сулли-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Henri IV de Sully было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de VENDOME, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite de Bourbon 22 июля 1320 г. в местности сулли-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 августа 1347 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет.
